title: Torres Quevedo's Electromechanical Arithmometer
description: Torres Quevedo's 1920 arithmometer, fully functional but never commercialized, which used a remote electromechanical typewriter to send commands to a remote electromechanical calculator and to print its results once computed.
author: Unknown authorUnknown author
attribution_md:
Torres Quevedo's Electromechanical Arithmometer
Torres Quevedo's 1920 arithmometer, fully functional but never commercialized, which used a remote electromechanical typewriter to send commands to a remote electromechanical calculator and to print its results once computed.

Image: Unknown authorUnknown author ([source](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Torres_Quevedo%27s_Electromechanical_Arithmometer.png))
